---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a user-facing improvement to cc-duet
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap are you trying to solve?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the behavior you want.

## Why this belongs in cc-duet

Explain why this should be part of the installer/runtime workflow rather than project-local customization.

## Extra context

Links, examples, or competing tools are welcome.
